# Lisa Galea
> Creative Leadership Consultant, Disruptive Alchemist, and Human-Centred AI Strategist based in Byron Bay Hinterland, Australia. Available globally.

Lisa Galea works with executive teams, business leaders, and organisations to upgrade how humans and AI work together — through behavioural science, play-based leadership, and strategic facilitation.

Tagline: "More brains. Less bollocks. All heart."
Operating philosophy: "Where Clarity Sparks Confidence and Mess Makes Momentum."

## Credentials & Background
- Master of Behavioural Science in Advertising (MBSc)
- Ogilvy Behavioural Economics Certification
- Brené Brown Dare to Lead Facilitator Certification
- Cannes Lions Behavioural Science Branding
- Truth Plane Body Language for Business
- 35+ years across advertising, branding, behavioural science, AI
- 5 successful businesses built across Australia
- Global client roster: Amnesty International, Audi, Heineken, Toyota, Marks & Spencer, Saatchi & Saatchi, Sotheby's, Penfolds, Ray-Ban, RizeUp Australia

## Services
- [Strategic Off-Sites & Team Retreats](/services) — Immersive off-sites at Sanctuary in the Pocket (Byron Bay Hinterland). Neuro-design, nudge psychology, playful strategy. Leaders leave with a 90-day action map. Capacity 5–50 people.
- [Executive Coaching & Leadership Labs — The HCOS Upgrade Framework](/services) — 1:1 and group coaching combining emotional intelligence, AI-enhanced clarity tools, nudging psychology, and narrative strategy.
- [Facilitation, Keynotes & Workshops](/services) — In-person and virtual. Signature topics: "Change is Good", "AI Without Burnout", "Behavioural Design & Nudgetech". For conferences, corporate events, summits.
- [AI Strategy via AiMegos](https://aimegos.com) — Human-centred AI integration, team upskilling, and AI literacy for organisations.

## HCOS Framework
The Human-Centred Operating System (HCOS) is Lisa's proprietary leadership framework — an operating system upgrade for how leaders think, connect, and decide. Combines EQ, behavioural science, AI-enhanced tools, and narrative strategy. IP held by Creative Change Collective.

## About
- [Full bio, values, timeline, and credentials](/about)
- Born UK. Nomadic childhood: Dubai → Nigeria → Australia. Curiosity wired in early.
- London advertising scene 1994–1998 (bridging print and digital)
- Entrepreneur since 1998 — built 5 businesses across Australia
- Core values: Enjoy Life (this is NOT a rehearsal), Believe in Possibilities, Make Moments Matter, Do Life Different

## Thought Leadership
- [Blog & Thought Garden](/blog) — Articles on embodied intelligence, rethinking risk, AI literacy, behavioural science, creative leadership, goal-setting, and more.
- Topics covered: somatic intelligence, loss aversion, Kurt Lewin, AI hallucination, design critique, micro-experiences, punctuation as voice

## ZiggyZap — AI Concierge
ZiggyZap is Lisa's AI website concierge — a Bowie-Warhol-Westwood mashup with a Master's in making things click. Available on every page (⚡ bottom-right corner). Can answer questions about services, book clarity calls, run a 15-question behavioural science quiz, and route visitors to the right resource.

- Available for corporate events, conferences, executive retreats, global summits

- Email: media@lisagalea.com

## Retreats
- Held at Sanctuary in the Pocket — private 5-acre rainforest property, Byron Bay Hinterland
- 30 min from Gold Coast Airport / 25 min from Ballina Airport
- External retreat site: https://sanctuaryinthepocket.com.au
